title.en: SHIFTING OR SHUNTING OF RAIL VEHICLES (shifting vehicles in general B60S; marshalling systems B61B)
Turntables; Traversers; Transporting rail vehicles on other rail vehicles or dollies (shunting B61J3/00)
Rollers or devices for shifting or transporting rail vehicles on rails

Shunting or short-distance haulage devices; Similar devices for hauling trains on steep gradients or as starting aids; Car propelling devices therefor (overhead travelling cranes combined with auxiliary means for shunting railway vehicles B66C17/26; capstans B66D)
Gravity shunting humps (track brakes or retarding apparatus fixed to permanent way B61K7/02)
Car shunting or haulage devices with cable traction or endless-chain driving means
Devices with reciprocated pushing bars or like driving mechanisms combined with the track for shunting or hauling cars (railway systems of this kind B61B13/12)
Car shunting or positioning devices with pinchbar action (pinchbars, crowbars in general B66F15/00)
Self-propelled tractors or pushing vehicles, e.g. mules (with cable traction B61J3/06)
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
